description: Fatimid state document, fragment, probably an investiture. The document is written in the dual, addressed to two officials: "Hurry up with it and report what you observe ... and act according to it."
description_he: מסמך ממלכתי פאטמי, שבר, ככל הנראה השקעה. המסמך כתוב בגוף זוגי, ממוען לשני פקידים.
